body:value:
The catalog contains data\
1. Basic indicators like area, population, workforce participation, and households present in the city. \
2. The pollution levels of the city.\
3. Basic details of the amenities provided to the public like schools, toilets, hospitals, libraries, community gardens, parks, gardens, bus stops, colleges, aadhar enrollment centers and licensed hawkers.\
4. Community facilities\
5. Citizen facilities.\
6. Health Infrastructure\
7. Mortality Rate\
